messages.content: Generate html webpage with javascript code to read a csv and find duplicates provided a column name. Generate only code without any extra content. The generated code should be production ready and runnable immediately.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Find Duplicates</title>
</head>
<body>
    <input type="file" id="csvFile" accept=".csv">
    <label for="columnName">Column Name:</label>
    <input type="text" id="columnName">
    <button onclick="findDuplicates()">Find Duplicates</button>

    <script>
        function findDuplicates() {
            const csvFile = document.getElementById('csvFile').files[0];
            const columnName = document.getElementById('columnName').value;

            if (csvFile && columnName) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (event) {
                    const csv = event.target.result;
                    const lines = csv.split('\n');
                    const headers = lines[0].split(',');

                    const columnIndex = headers.indexOf(columnName);
                    if (columnIndex === -1) {
                        alert('Column not found!');
                        return;
                    }

                    const values = [];
                    for (let i = 1; i < lines.length; i++) {
                        if (lines[i].trim() !== '') {
                            const data = lines[i].split(',');
                            values.push(data[columnIndex]);
                        }
                    }

                    const duplicates = values.filter((value, index, self) => self.indexOf(value) !== index);

                    if (duplicates.length === 0) {
                        alert('No duplicates found!');
                    } else {
                        alert('Duplicates found:\n' + duplicates.join(', '));
                    }
                };
                reader.readAsText(csvFile);
            } else {
                alert('Please select a CSV file and enter a column name!');
            }
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>

Generate html webpage with tailwindcss and use javascript code to read a csv and find duplicates provided a column name. Generate only code without any extra content. The generated code should be production ready and runnable immediately.
rewrite the code with proper linting and documentation
generate content with utf-8

the generated code tailwindcss link is not working
what are the different links you have for tailwindcss

Here are a few different links you can use to include Tailwind CSS in your HTML file:

1. CDN link for latest version:
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com/2.2.16/tailwind.min.css">
```

2. UNPKG link for specific version:
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/tailwindcss@2.2.16/dist/tailwind.min.css">
```

3. jsDelivr link for specific version:
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/tailwindcss@2.2.16/dist/tailwind.min.css">
```

Please note that these links correspond to version 2.2.16 of Tailwind CSS. You can change the version number in the URL to use a different version if needed.
version 2.2.15

For version 2.2.15 of Tailwind CSS, you can include the following CDN link in your HTML file:

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/tailwindcss@2.2.15/dist/tailwind.min.css">
```

This link will load the tailwind.min.css file for version 2.2.15 from the jsDelivr CDN.
